hero.subtitle: The future of energy
whysolar.desc: Learn everything you need to know about photovoltaic solar energy and join Green Solar.
whysolar.item1.title: Save money
whysolar.item1.desc: Forget about paying high electricity bills. Generate your own energy.
whysolar.item2.title: Warranty
whysolar.item2.desc: Between 15 and 25 years of warranty for your solar panels.
whysolar.item3.title: Helps the environment
whysolar.item3.desc: It's clean energy that significantly reduces your carbon footprint.
whysolar.item4.title: Quality installation
whysolar.item4.desc: Our team has the experience to make sure your system is installed correctly.
about.block1.title: Who are we?
about.block1.desc: We are a team of professionals working with solar energy since 2016. In 2020 we decided to create our own photovoltaic installation company, Green Solar, with the vision of becoming one of the leading solar panel distributors throughout Spain.
about.block2.title: What do we do?
about.block2.desc: We offer clean energy that's affordable for our customers. At Green Solar we believe using solar panels is the best alternative when it comes to renewable, sustainable energy. That's why we work every day so more people can enjoy the benefits of solar energy.
about.block3.title: A sustainable option
about.block3.desc: Electricity generated from fossil fuels is currently responsible for 80% of carbon dioxide emissions. It's also expensive. At Green Solar we offer a safe, environmentally friendly alternative that, over time, means great savings for those who choose it.

testimonials.title: What do our customers say?
testimonials.card1.name: Laura G.
testimonials.card1.text: I'm delighted with my new photovoltaic solar pergola from Green Solar. It hasn't just turned my patio into a beautiful, functional space — I'm also saving on my electricity bills. The installation team was professional and friendly.
testimonials.card2.name: Juan M.
testimonials.card2.text: I decided to install a solar pergola at my restaurant and it's been an excellent investment. My customers enjoy the shade the pergola provides, while the solar panels generate clean energy to run the business. I'm very happy with the results!
testimonials.card3.name: Marta S.
testimonials.card3.text: Green Solar's photovoltaic solar pergola has exceeded my expectations. It's not only visually appealing, I've also noticed a significant reduction in my electricity costs. The Green Solar team was very professional and made sure the installation was quick and efficient.
testimonials.card4.name: Carlos R.
testimonials.card4.text: Green Solar's solar pergola has been an amazing addition to our home. Besides providing shade and protection from the elements, we're generating our own electricity and saving on our monthly costs. The Green Solar team was very attentive.
testimonials.card5.name: Ana P.
testimonials.card5.text: The installation of our photovoltaic solar pergola was flawless, and the Green Solar team was extremely professional and friendly. We now enjoy a beautiful, functional outdoor space, and we're doing our part for the environment by using solar energy. We're thrilled we chose Green Solar!
services.title: Our Services
services.item1.title: Solar Panels
services.item1.desc: Custom photovoltaic installation to reduce your electricity bill.
services.item2.title: EV Chargers
services.item2.desc: Charging points for electric vehicles, connected to your solar installation.
services.item3.title: Batteries
services.item3.desc: Store surplus energy and use it whenever you need it most.
services.item4.title: Pool Heating
services.item4.desc: Heat your pool with solar energy and extend the swimming season.
workflow.title: How does the process work?
workflow.step1.title: Free consultation
workflow.step1.desc: You tell us your needs and we review your electricity usage, no obligation.
workflow.step2.title: Study and design
workflow.step2.desc: We design the custom installation, calculating panels, inverter and estimated savings.
workflow.step3.title: Quote and paperwork
workflow.step3.desc: We present the final quote and handle the permits and subsidies.
workflow.step4.title: Installation
workflow.step4.desc: Our team installs your solar panels quickly and professionally.
workflow.step5.title: Legalization and commissioning
workflow.step5.desc: We legalize the installation and connect it, ready to produce energy.
workflow.step6.title: Guaranteed savings
workflow.step6.desc: You start generating your own energy and lowering your electricity bill.
contact.title: Save with Green Solar
contact.desc: We'll help you choose your panels and the ideal solar rate for you — it's that easy!
contact.address: Calle Yuca, 15 Pilar de la Horadada – Alicante (03190)

cookie.banner_text: We use our own and third-party cookies to improve your experience. You can accept, reject, or customize them. More information in our
cookie.modal_desc: We use cookies so the website works properly and, with your consent, to analyze it, personalize it, and show tailored advertising. You can turn each type on or off below. See our
cookie.category.tecnicas.name: Technical
cookie.category.tecnicas.desc: Necessary for the website to work properly (navigation, remembering your cookie preferences, etc.). They don't require your authorization and can't be disabled.
cookie.category.analisis.name: Analytics
cookie.category.analisis.desc: Let us study how users navigate the website (most-visited sections, how services perform, etc.) to improve it. They have no advertising purpose.
cookie.category.funcionalidad.name: Functionality and Personalization
cookie.category.funcionalidad.desc: Remember your preferences (language, favorite sections, browser type, etc.) to personalize your experience on the site.
cookie.category.publicidad.name: Advertising
cookie.category.publicidad.desc: Manage ad spaces based on the content shown and how often ads appear, so they're more useful and less repetitive.
cookie.category.publicidad_comportamenta: Collect information about your browsing habits to show you advertising tailored to your tastes and personal interests.
